appDesc.message: Cosmetic controls for the YouTube guide menu.

about.message: Toggle tweaks in thematic groups. Group switches disable the entire block without losing your individual selections.

grpPrimaryMenu_desc.message: Hide shortcuts from the main guide.

grpPersonalNav_desc.message: Tidy up history and playlist links.

hideHome_desc.message: Removes the Home shortcut from the guide.

hideSubscriptionsChannelsList_desc.message: Collapses the expandable list of subscribed channels.

removeEmptySubscriptionsBlock_desc.message: Removes the Subscriptions section when every entry is hidden.

hideShortsMenuItem_desc.message: Removes the Shorts link from the menu.

hideDownloads_desc.message: Removes the Downloads link from the guide.

hideYourVideos_desc.message: Hides the Your videos link and channel video tabs.

hidePlaylists_desc.message: Removes the Playlists hub and custom playlists.

hideWatchLater_desc.message: Removes the Watch later playlist link.

hideLiked_desc.message: Removes the Liked videos playlist shortcut.

hideMoreFromYouTubeBlockWhenEmpty_desc.message: Collapses the More from YouTube section when all items are hidden.

hideReportHistory_desc.message: Removes the Report history page link.

hideSendFeedback_desc.message: Removes feedback and report a problem links.

hideGuidePrimarySecondaryLinks_desc.message: Hides the primary and secondary footer link clusters.

removeCopyrightNode_desc.message: Deletes the YouTube copyright notice node.

hideSettings_desc.message: Removes the Settings entry from the guide.
